rationale: The cited paper appears only as a single example in the concluding future-research discussion, where the authors suggest studying learning using consumers who are new to a category. It is not used to build the compliance framework, motivate hypotheses, define variables, or support the estimation approach in the main analysis. The citing paper's core theory and empirical model are developed from other streams (e.g., compliance/health-belief and related work), so this citation functions as a peripheral pointer rather than a meaningful input to the current study.
